case_title: ANN KONG VS. JEOM RYE LEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY KONG, ANN AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED APR-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2012 - CONTINUED FOR KOREAN INTERPRETER TO JUN-13-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT TO BRING HER OWN INTERPRETER AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONG, ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,075.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE HEARING SET FOR SEP-10-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JEOM RYE LEE, 5733 GEARY BLVD.,SF,CA.94121
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-26-2012 (SERVICE FEE $35.00) AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED *(ISSUED TO: JEOM RYE LEE) (SERVICE FEE $35.00)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $85.95 ACCRUED INTEREST, $130.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2012 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO OCT-29-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CASE MIGHT SETTLE PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 9/10/12 IS RECALLED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $251.75 ACCRUED INTEREST, $130.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JEOM RYE

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2012 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-29-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2012 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGESS REPORT TO MAR-28-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PER CREDITOR, DEBTOR PAID $500 TODAY. DEBTOR TO PAY $500 EACH MONTH BY CASHIER'S CHECK ON 29TH DAY OF EACH MONTH TO CREDITOR. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONTINUED FOR 4 MONTHS INTERVAL FOR PROGRESS REPORT UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID IN FULL. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 10/29/12 IS RECALLED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2013 IS CONTINUED PER PROGRESS REPORT 11/29/12 TO JUL-25-2013 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2013 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-06-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IS MAKING PAYMENTS ON TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, JEOM RYE LEE; THE MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT APPEAR; THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR; JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D506).
